title: TJ Maxx parent’s earnings show discount clothes and home goods are still in high demand
author: Tomi Kilgore
fullText: TJ Maxx parent company TJX reported a triple beat with its fourth-quarter results on Wednesday, but shares of the off-price apparel and home-fashions retailer slipped as the outlook disappointed.
summary: TJ Maxx parent company TJX reported a triple beat with its fourth-quarter results on Wednesday, but shares of the off-price apparel and home-fashions retailer slipped as the outlook disappointed.
